ab: Dangi mu ka Ukan, laqi Seediq ka heya duri.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Ukan，他也是賽德克族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Ukan, and he is also an Seediq child.

ab: Gaga miyan msuupu muuyas alang Tongan.
ch: 我們一起在眉溪部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Tongan tribe.

ab: Msuupu miyan rudan mbahang rmengo kari ndaan klaali, mkela nami riyung rmengo kari Seediq.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說賽德族語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Seediq proficiently.

ab: Reko ma qtehur ka hnyegan mu, llebu ma kure hnyegan na ka Ukan.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Ukan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Ukan is short and thin.

ab: Mdrumuc riyung ka Ukan, smkuxul nami heya ka yami.
ch: Ukan很勤快，我們都很喜歡他。
en: Ukan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
